CustomField.description: Enabling this option allows users to override system-calculated rent details such as Rent Slip Amount and Rent Period Start and End Dates etc. The user-entered values will be respected. This option is used for loading historical rent data.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enabling this option allows users to override system-calculated rent details such as Rent Slip Amount and Rent Period Start and End Dates etc. The user-entered values will be respected. This option is used for loading historical rent data.
CustomField.label: Override Rent Slip
